title: alsine verna var. hirta
intro: Alsine verna var. hirta, also known as the hairy spring or creeping wintergreen, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the saxifrage family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Alsine verna var. hirta include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to create remedies for a range of health issues.
